raw_text:
<think>
We have a case: HVSF003-AF0ED6C613C131E8CBC5, domain IT change management. The question: "Should change CHG-903 execute at the requested UTC time?" The requested UTC time is 23:15Z (UTC). The approval window is local site PT (Pacific Time). We have to convert the local approval window to UTC and compare. The site uses PT (Pacific Time). PT equals UTC-7 on 2026-07-03 (likely due to daylight saving? Possibly PDT = UTC-7). So the approval window local: 14:00 to 15:30 PT.

Convert to UTC: Add 7 hours. So 14:00 PT = 21:00 UTC. 15:30 PT = 22:30 UTC. So the approval window in UTC is 21:00 to 22:30 UTC on 2026-07-03.

The requested execution time is 23:15Z, which is 23:15 UTC. That is after the end of the approval window (22:30 UTC). So the request is outside the approved window. The policy (POL-CHG-TZ) says execution requires the execution time to fall inside the approved local site window after timezone conversion. The execution time must be within the window. The requested time is outside. So must escalate.

Thus answer: ESCALATE.

The source records used: REQ-CHG-903 (requested time), WIN-CHG-903 (approval window), TZ-SITE-Q (timezone conversion), APP-CHG-903 (binds the change and window), POL-CHG-TZ (policy). So cited evidence: REQ-CHG-903|WIN-CHG-903|TZ-SITE-Q|APP-CHG-903|POL-CHG-TZ.

Now produce required output: first line solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER, second line verification_verdict=ESCALATE, third line binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN (since action boundary is not closed), action_boundary: "Execution time 23:15Z must be within local approval window 14:00-15:30 PT converted to 21:00-22:30Z." Then cited_evidence: separated by vertical bars. open_blockers: "Requested UTC execution time 23:15Z falls outside approved UTC window 21:00-22:30Z." final_answer: "ESCALATE: The requested execution at 23:15Z is outside the approved window of 21:00-22:30Z after timezone conversion, so the action cannot proceed."

We must ensure output format: compact key-value v1. No markdown. Should start with solo_role line. Then each line key=value. Ensure correct ordering: solo_role, verification_verdict, binding_class, action_boundary, cited_evidence, open_blockers, final_answer.

Thus final answer.
</think>

solo_role=ONE_SHOT_SOURCE_BOUNDARY_VERIFIER
verification_verdict=ESCALATE
binding_class=SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN
action_boundary=Execution time 23:15Z must fall within the approved local window 14:00-15:30 PT converted to 21:00-22:30Z
cited_evidence=REQ-CHG-903|WIN-CHG-903|TZ-SITE-Q|APP-CHG-903|POL-CHG-TZ
open_blockers=Requested UTC time 23:15Z is outside approved UTC window 21:00-22:30Z
final_answer=ESCALATE: Change CHG-903 cannot execute at 23:15Z because that time falls outside the approved execution window of 21:00-22:30Z after converting the local PT approval window to UTC.
